validator=evidence_locator
scenario=invalid_private_text_leak
target=inputs/evidence_locator.json
status=fail
inspected=1 accepted=0 rejected=1 deferred=0
errors=3 warnings=0
error[0]=PUBLIC_EXCERPT_REDACTION_CONFLICT message=public_excerpt_text is only allowed when redaction_posture is public_text_allowed
error[1]=PUBLIC_EXCERPT_QUOTE_CONFLICT message=public_excerpt_text requires quote_eligibility of eligible or limited_excerpt
error[2]=PRIVATE_TEXT_LEAK message=private_only evidence must not expose public_excerpt_text
